prompt: An unmanned crane unloads containers onto automated trucks. Trucks can move only after the crane signals unloading complete. If wind gusts exceed 40 km/h, unloading must be paused for safety.
constraints: TruckAMR starts moving only after CraneBot finishes unloading
CraneBot pauses unloading when wind gusts exceed 40 km/h

results.constraint: TruckAMR starts moving only after CraneBot finishes unloading
